{{Quote|Fleet command has charged the ''Sentinel'' with intercepting and questioning vessels which enter the system during maneuvers.|[[Rowen]] to [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]|<ref name="Platt's Smugglers Guide">''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Sentinel''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]. It was stationed at [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]], where it conducted training exercises.

On one occasion, it boarded and searched the ''[[Brentaal Princess]]'', but the troops under the command of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Rowen]] failed to uncover the hidden [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] being [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] onto the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] by [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]].
